mapper.insert: INSERT INTO LOST(lnum, mnum, title, category, CONTENTS, lphone, writer, litem, reip, status, itemcategory, losttime, lostloc, ldate) VALUES(lost_seq.NEXTVAL,#{mnum},#{title},#{category},#{contents},#{lphone},#{writer},#{litem},#{reip},'unsolved',#{itemcategory}, TO_DATE(#{losttime},'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'),#{lostloc},SYSDATE)
mapper.select: SELECT l.lnum, l.mnum, l.title, l.category, TO_CHAR(l.CONTENTS) as contents, l.lphone, l.writer, l.litem, l.reip, l.status, l.itemcategory, TO_CHAR(l.losttime, 'YYYY-MM-DD AM HH:MI') AS losttime, l.lostloc, TO_CHAR(l.ldate, 'YYYY-MM-DD AM HH:MI') AS ldate, li.lostimgsid, li.imgname FROM LOST l LEFT JOIN LOSTIMGS li ON l.lnum = li.lostimgsid WHERE l.lnum = #{lnum}
mapper.update: UPDATE lost SET title = #{title}, contents = #{contents}, lphone = #{lphone}, litem = #{litem}, itemcategory = #{itemcategory}, losttime = TO_DATE(#{losttime}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), lostloc = #{lostloc}, ldate = SYSDATE WHERE lnum = #{lnum}
UPDATE lost SET status = 'solved' WHERE lnum = #{lnum}
mapper.select: SELECT TITLE,LNUM ,to_char(ldate, 'YYYY-MM-DD')as ldate FROM lost WHERE CATEGORY = 'lost' ORDER BY LDATE DESC FETCH FIRST 4 ROWS ONLY
